questionHtml:
A cell of emf 6.0 V and negligible internal resistance is connected to three resistors as shown.

The resistors have resistance of 3.0 Ω and 6.0 Ω as shown.

                                                     

What is the current in resistor X?

A.     0.40 A

B.     0.50 A

C.     1.0 A

D.     2.0 A
